products.name: DUCA MOSCATI (EUROSPIN) PANETTONE
pros: Average price of €4.66 per kg, under €7 per loaf
High overall quality rating in Altroconsumo’s 2025 comparison

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 panettone tests identify DUCA MOSCATI (EUROSPIN) as a top‑rated product, offering good quality at a competitive price. The evidence is fresh, published in December 2025.
